SELECT day_number, fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(day_number) AS date_result FROM test_dates WHERE day_number > 0;
SELECT day_number, fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(day_number) AS date_result FROM test_dates WHERE day_number < 0;
SELECT day_number, fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(day_number) AS date_result FROM test_dates ORDER BY day_number DESC;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates) AS total_entries SELECT day_number, fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(day_number) AS date_result FROM test_dates WHERE total_entries > 0;
CREATE TABLE valid_days (valid_day Int64) AS SELECT day_number FROM test_dates WHERE day_number IS NOT NULL;
SELECT VD.valid_day, fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(VD.valid_day) AS converted_date FROM valid_days VD JOIN test_dates TD ON VD.valid_day = TD.day_number;
SELECT day_number, fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(day_number) AS date_result FROM test_dates WHERE day_number IN (SELECT day_number FROM test_dates WHERE day_number < 58850);
SELECT fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull((SELECT MAX(day_number) FROM test_dates)) AS latest_date;
